en.qualityTooltip: Compression quality from 1-100. Higher quality means less compression and larger files.
en.effortTooltip:
Level of CPU effort to reduce file size from 0-6.
Higher effort means image processing will take longer but will usually be better looking & lower in filesize.
en.themeTooltip: The display theme of the app. Auto defaults to your systems preference.
en.maxWidthTooltip: The max width to resize to of the output image. Enter 0 for no resize clamping on this axis.
en.maxHeightTooltip: The max height to resize to of the output image. Enter 0 for no resize clamping on this axis.
en.outputFolderTooltip: By default your user's Pictures folder is used for the root of the output folders. You may also set a custom direectory.
en.languageTooltip: The written language used throughout the app.
en.formatTooltip:
The output file format. WebP is default and typically offers better compression than the other options.
It also has wide browser support and offers support for animated formats like gif.
Jpeg and png are available as well in case the need comes up.
en.fileTypeOneOf: File type must be one of
